Class GeminiResponse

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.Response<GeminiModelMessage>
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.GeminiResponse
public class GeminiResponse extends Response<GeminiModelMessage>
A specialized, object-oriented Response class for the Gemini provider. It encapsulates all the logic for converting a native Google GenerateContentResponse into the Anahata domain model, making it a self-contained and reusable component.
Author:
anahata

    private final List<GeminiModelMessage>

    The list of converted model messages.
    private final com.google.genai.types.GenerateContentResponse

    The original, native response object from the Google GenAI API. transient to avoid serialization of SDK types.

    modelVersion
    The model version used for this specific generation.

    promptFeedback
    Optional feedback from the safety filters.
    private final String
    rawHistoryJson
    The raw JSON of the conversation history sent in the request.

  • Constructor Details

    • GeminiResponse

      public GeminiResponse(String requestConfigJson, String historyJson, Agi agi, String modelId, com.google.genai.types.GenerateContentResponse genaiResponse)
      Constructs a GeminiResponse, performing the full conversion from the native Google GenAI response to the Anahata domain model.
      Parameters:
      requestConfigJson - The raw JSON of the request configuration.
      historyJson - The raw JSON of the conversation history sent in the request.
      agi - The parent agi session, required for constructing model messages.
      modelId - The ID of the model that generated this response.
      genaiResponse - The native response object from the API.

  • Method Details

    • convertUsageMetadata

      private ResponseUsageMetadata convertUsageMetadata(com.google.genai.types.GenerateContentResponseUsageMetadata genaiUsage)
      Converts the native GenAI usage metadata to the V2 core model.
      Parameters:
      genaiUsage - The native usage metadata.
      Returns:
      The V2 ResponseUsageMetadata.

    • getTotalTokenCount

      public int getTotalTokenCount()
      Gets the total number of tokens for the entire interaction (prompt + all candidates).
      Specified by:
      getTotalTokenCount in class Response<GeminiModelMessage>
      Returns:
      The total token count.
